title: A rather hilarious EVA themed game I found online
display_title: A rather hilarious EVA themed game I found online
wikitext:
[]: A rather hilarious EVA-themed game I found online             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:04 pm http://www.onlineflashgames.net/games/2487/evangelion-pac-man.html It's a Pac-Man clone in which you must guide Shinji through the city, collecting "sanity pills" and avoiding Angels. The Berzerker Unit 01 powerups help you defeat the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:07 pm Thats funny after you eat Sachiel the core goes back instead of ghost eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:19 pm I the little Matarial and Sachiel's little legs.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:24 pm LOL, realistic story i must say, no realy, this wasn't meant sarcastic!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:43 pm Run Sachi Run! Fun game even though I suck at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Jul 01, 2009 3:50 pm What happens if you grab the Rei, I could never reach it in time.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 01, 2009 4:54 pm Wow, I haven't seen this in a while. Be sure to check out the rest of the stuff this guy has done: http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_1_aftermath.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_2_rei_goes_insane.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_2_rei_goes_insane_dx.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_3_the_world_is_fucked.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_4_dating_sim_rpg.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_5_the_rei_puppet_show.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_eva_6_ending_eva_after_its_end.htm http://evamonkey.com/flash_so_cubed_evangelion_pac_man.htm

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 01, 2009 8:15 pm The controls are more difficult than Pac Man.

[]:             Quote Post by xfactor30seconds » Wed Jul 01, 2009 8:34 pm that was funny lol

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Jul 03, 2009 11:14 am Oh, dear me, those cartoons were hilarious...the Rei Puppet Show one in particular.

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Fri Jul 03, 2009 11:26 am lol in the dating one I killed Kaji and cooked PenPen

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Jul 03, 2009 3:46 pm DanteNeverCry wrote: lol in the dating one I killed Kaji and cooked PenPen

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Jul 05, 2009 8:27 am Ugh, this is killing me! I can't kill Matariel in the dating sim! Since when is he HARD!? My entire concept of reality is torn asunder!

The Berzerker Unit 01 powerups help you defeat the angels.
